userStories.title: Migration Project.githubPat + RLS
userStories.description: ALTER TABLE Project ADD COLUMN githubPat text. Política SELECT restritiva (só admin OU pmId do projeto). Atualiza database.types.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: database.types.ts atualizado com githubPat?: string | null

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='Project' AND column_name='githubPat'

userStories.title: src/lib/forge/workspace.ts (ensureWorkspace + teardown)
userStories.description: Cria pasta .forge/<runId>/workspace, git clone --depth 1 do repoUrl, cria branch forge/<prdSlug>-<runId-short>. teardownWorkspace remove. gcStaleWorkspaces remove workspaces > maxAgeHours.
acceptanceCriteria: ensureWorkspace falha early se project.repoUrl null/empty
Se PAT presente, injeta como Bearer no clone URL (https://x-access-token:<pat>@github.com/...)

userStories.title: exec-story.ts spawna claude com cwd=workspacePath
userStories.description: Antes de spawn, chama ensureWorkspace(runId, project). Passa workspacePath pro spawn como cwd. Emite event workspace_ready. Fallback: se projectId ausente OU stub, mantém cwd=Zordon (dogfood mode).
acceptanceCriteria: Se projectId real, chama ensureWorkspace antes do spawn claude
Emit event workspace_ready com path, branch, repoUrl

userStories.title: closeout faz gh pr create no repo-alvo
userStories.description: closeout.ts: cd workspacePath, git push origin branch, gh pr create --repo owner/repo --base defaultBranch --draft --title 'forge: prdSlug' --body. Usa GH_TOKEN=pat override.
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/forge/closeout.ts aceita { runId, workspacePath, project, prdSlug }
Faz git push origin <branch> dentro do workspacePath
Se project.githubPat presente, exporta GH_TOKEN antes do gh

userStories.title: API + CLI aceitam projectId
userStories.description: POST /api/forge/autoruns aceita { prdSlug, projectId, maxStories? }. forge init/run no CLI aceita --project. Quando projectId presente, ForgeRun row é criada com projectId real.
acceptanceCriteria: src/app/api/forge/autoruns/route.ts valida projectId opcional; quando presente, persiste
ForgeRun.projectId reflete valor real OU stub conforme fallback

userStories.title: gcStaleWorkspaces cron + forge ps --target
userStories.description: scripts/forge/gc-workspaces.ts chama gcStaleWorkspaces (default 24h). pg_cron schedule diária. forge ps mostra coluna Target (owner/repo ou (zordon)).
acceptanceCriteria: forge ps mostra coluna 'Target' (último ProjectRun.projectId resolvido)

verifiable.command_or_query: SELECT jobname FROM cron.job WHERE jobname='forge_workspace_gc'
